prompt:
Generate a highly identifiable Pi coding session title from this first message. Always reply in English only, even if the message is in another language. Use 4-8 lowercase English words. Use only lowercase letters, digits if needed, and spaces. Include concrete target + task type, e.g. plugin config, session naming, auth bug, deploy failure. Prefer specificity over elegance. Avoid generic words alone like research, fix, config, discussion. No quotes. No punctuation. Reply ONLY the title.

<message>
{{query}}
</message>
